title: YouTube Poop: Problem Producing Plumbers
description:
I realize that this has already been done before, but as a continuously evolving(?) YTP-er I feel like I ought to try everything, so I try my hand at making a long-form poop out of an entire episode of something.

I probably won't make another one of these unless people demand it, because it took up a lot of space on my computer when I was in the design process.

Also as you can see I've gotten rid of the YTP-ident intro in favor of something a little different. From now on when you tune in to one of my poops you're greeted by a short non-sequitur clip like this one.
local_file: videos\Vorhias\YouTube Poop Problem Producing Plumbers - aolK3W3vTog.mp4
